section.div: Configure this plugin with repositories you want to feature!

A C++ command-line food delivery management system built using object-oriented programming. It supports customer, admin, and delivery agent roles, along with restaurant menus, cart operations, orders, payments, and file-based persistence. The project is designed to demonstrate core OOP principles through a modular backend-style application.
A collection of my daily coding practice, semester assignments, and lab tasks in C++ and Python.
